title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh advocates teaching AI through manual, foundational approaches rather than via tools and frameworks. He argues that deep mathematical understanding survives industry shifts and hype cycles better than tool-dependent skills.
